<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Happy Birthday, Chaitra 💜</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400&family=Dancing+Script:wght@600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --plum:     #3b1f5e;
      --violet:   #6b3fa0;
      --lavender: #c9b8e8;
      --blush:    #f0e8fa;
      --cream:    #faf7ff;
      --gold:     #c8a96e;
      --ink:      #2a1640;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--cream);
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ── HERO ── */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--plum) 0%, #5a2d82 55%, #8b5cbf 100%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 2rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, rgba(201,184,232,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
                  radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, rgba(107,63,160,0.3) 0%, transparent 60%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Floating petals */
    .petal {
      position: absolute;
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50% 0 50% 0;
      background: rgba(201,184,232,0.4);
      animation: float linear infinite;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    @keyframes float {
      0%   { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
      10%  { opacity: 1; }
      90%  { opacity: 0.6; }
      100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;
      color: var(--lavender);
      font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 3vw, 1.5rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      animation: fadeUp 1s ease both;
    }

    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 7rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #fff;
      line-height: 1.05;
      animation: fadeUp 1s 0.2s ease both;
      text-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }

    .hero-title span {
      font-style: italic;
      color: var(--lavender);
    }

    .hero-date {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.25em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(201,184,232,0.7);
      animation: fadeUp 1s 0.4s ease both;
    }

    .hero-heart {
      margin-top: 3rem;
      font-size: 2rem;
      animation: fadeUp 1s 0.6s ease both, pulse 2s 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    .scroll-hint {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 2rem;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.4rem;
      color: rgba(201,184,232,0.5);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      animation: fadeUp 1s 1s ease both;
    }

    .scroll-hint::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 1px;
      height: 40px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(201,184,232,0.5), transparent);
      animation: scrollLine 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes scrollLine {
      0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; }
      50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.3; }
    }

    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
      50%       { transform: scale(1.15); }
    }

    /* ── GALLERY ── */
    .section {
      padding: 6rem 1.5rem;
    }

    .section-label {
      text-align: center;
      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;
      color: var(--violet);
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .section-title {
      text-align: center;
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3rem);
      color: var(--plum);
      margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
    }

    .gallery-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
      max-width: 1100px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .photo-item {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      transition: opacity 0.6s ease var(--delay), transform 0.6s ease var(--delay);
    }

    .photo-item.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .photo-frame {
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(59,31,94,0.15);
      aspect-ratio: 4/5;
      background: var(--lavender);
      transition: transform 0.35s ease, box-shadow 0.35s ease;
    }

    .photo-frame:hover {
      transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(59,31,94,0.25);
    }

    .photo-frame img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
    }

    .photo-caption {
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: var(--violet);
    }

    /* ── DIVIDER ── */
    .divider {
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--lavender);
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      letter-spacing: 1rem;
      padding: 1rem 0;
    }

    /* ── LETTER ── */
    .letter-section {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--blush) 0%, var(--cream) 100%);
      padding: 6rem 1.5rem;
    }

    .letter-wrap {
      max-width: 720px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .letter-paper {
      background: #fff;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 4rem);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 60px rgba(59,31,94,0.1), 0 1px 4px rgba(59,31,94,0.06);
      position: relative;
    }

    .letter-paper::before {
      content: '💌';
      position: absolute;
      top: -1.2rem;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 2rem;
      background: #fff;
      padding: 0 0.5rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    .letter-paper::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 3rem;
      top: 4rem;
      bottom: 3rem;
      width: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--lavender), transparent);
      opacity: 0.5;
    }

    .letter-to {
      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      color: var(--violet);
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .letter-paper p {
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.9;
      color: #3d2860;
      margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
    }

    .letter-sign {
      margin-top: 2rem;
      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      color: var(--plum);
      text-align: right;
    }

    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    .footer {
      background: var(--plum);
      color: rgba(201,184,232,0.6);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }

    .footer-heart {
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
      animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .gallery-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
        gap: 1rem;
      }
      .letter-paper::after { display: none; }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *, *::before, *::after { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="top">
  <!-- Floating petals generated by JS -->
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">for my favourite person in the world 💜</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Happy Birthday,<br><span>Chaitra</span></h1>
  <p class="hero-date">June 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Two beautiful years of us &nbsp;·&nbsp; 💜</p>
  <div class="hero-heart">💜</div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">scroll</div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="section" id="gallery">
  <p class="section-label">our little world</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Memories I'll never forget</h2>
  <div class="gallery-grid">
    
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.0s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 1" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Cutie putie 💗</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.1s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 2" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Not sooo cool but cute 💛</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.2s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 3" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Enthaa bagunam Bebe 🧿</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.30000000000000004s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 4" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Spider with his spidey 🕷️</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.4s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 5" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">TOT will always be special 💜</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.5s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 6" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Happie happie 😊</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.6000000000000001s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 7" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">College cuties 🩶</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.7000000000000001s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 8" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">Adam gah dorakadaniki help 🖤</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item" style="--delay:0.8s">
          <div class="photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Memory 9" loading="lazy" />
          </div>
          <p class="photo-caption">My fav 🤍</p>
        </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider">✦ &nbsp; ✦ &nbsp; ✦</div>

<!-- LETTER -->
<section class="letter-section" id="letter">
  <div class="letter-wrap">
    <p class="section-label" style="text-align:center">a letter from your boy 💜</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">From my heart to yours</h2>
    <div class="letter-paper">
      <p class="letter-to">My dearest Chaitra,</p>
      <p>I don't know if I'll ever be able to explain what I felt on June 11th, 2024. I still remember sitting on the back bench and seeing you enter the class for the first time. I remember your eyes more than anything — there was just something about them that made me keep looking at you, and I just emo masthu lothuuu la pada and that fall will be the favourite for me 💗</p>
<p>After a few days when you asked for my Instagram ID and texted me that evening, I was happier than I had ever been. I have told you this chaala sarlu ig but still I laugh thinking about how excited I was for your message — andharini bro anav that made me more agaaaam 🤣😚</p>
<p>Everything happened so fast after that. We talked about random things, our favorites, and the little details of our lives. Then on June 21st, I told you how I felt — I still know how I told you: "I don't know what is this feeling but I just want to make you mine 💗" 😚🤓 Looking back now I was nervous but I'm glad I did it because it led to some of the best and the bestest memories of my life.</p>
<p>I still remember the auto rides home, our walks on the gully talking about nothing and everything, and the first kiss you gave me on my cheek in the auto — and the first kiss on the lip, actually I gave, anyways 😌 It was such a small moment, but I'll never forget it.</p>
<p>One of my favorite memories will always be the days I spent at your house — the special tulasi tea you made, nanu pakkana kuchopeatukoni thinipichinapudu 💗 — and just being with you. Those days felt unreal to me, crazy dreamy days of my life avi.</p>
<p>Not everything was easy. Mi intlo mi daddy ki red chethulA Dorkinam — things became difficult and there were times when it felt like motham ayipoindhi. But even then you stood strong. You handled things that I know weren't easy, and I've never forgotten that.</p>
<p>We spent hours on stairs, rooftops, video calls, and in conversations that seemed to never end. We fought, we struggled, and sometimes we didn't even get to meet for months. But somehow we kept going.</p>
<p>I don't know what the future holds. I know things haven't felt the same lately. But on your birthday, I don't want to focus on worries. I just want to thank you for being by my side and being my best friend. Idk how I make you feel now but I will work on myself and I will make a good future for us if everything goes well from now on — sorry for the disappointments. Pakka I'll make sure everything will be okay 🫂</p>
<p>Thank you for every memory 💗 — every laugh, every walk, every call, every effort, and every moment that became a part of my life.</p>
<p>No matter what happens, this day will always be a special day to me. I just want to make you happy. Maybe one fine day, me and you will be enjoying this day at peaks. I promise 💗</p>

      <p class="letter-sign">— your man 💗<br><small style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--lavender)">(ig your boy fits better)</small><br><br>na bangaram, bujjikonda, na one only oil dabba, cutie 💗</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="footer">
  <span class="footer-heart">💜</span>
  Made with love, just for you, Chaitra &nbsp;·&nbsp; Happy Birthday
</footer>

<script>
  // Generate floating petals
  const hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
  for (let i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement('div');
    p.className = 'petal';
    const size = 4 + Math.random() * 10;
    p.style.cssText = `
      width:${size}px; height:${size}px;
      left:${Math.random()*100}%;
      animation-duration:${8+Math.random()*12}s;
      animation-delay:${Math.random()*10}s;
      opacity:${0.2+Math.random()*0.5};
      border-radius:${Math.random()>0.5?'50% 0 50% 0':'50%'};
    `;
    hero.appendChild(p);
  }

  // Scroll-triggered photo reveal
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('.photo-item');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  items.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
